title: Aspects of His Character
description: According to'Umar b. Shabbah-'Ali: Yazid b. 'Atikah was one of their (that is, the Marwinids') youths.663 One day, when he was in a good mood, he said, in the presence of Habibah664 and Sallimah,665 "Let me fly." Habibah said, "To whom will you entrust the Muslim community? "666 When he died, Sallimah of alQass667 recited:

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
